zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabella Basset於1172年出生在英國英格蘭貝德福爾可拉法姆時，她的父親Thomas Basset42歲，母親Adeliza Dunstanville38歲。她於大約1190年與Robert Mauduit Lord of Hanslope在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾韓斯洛普結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1224年1月5日在英國巴金哈姆爾韓斯洛普享年52歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabella Basset于1172年出生在英国英格兰貝德福爾可拉法姆时，她的父亲Thomas Basset42岁，母亲Adeliza Dunstanville38岁。她于大约1190年与Robert Mauduit Lord of Hanslope在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾韓斯洛普结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1224年1月5日在英国巴金哈姆爾韓斯洛普享年52岁。

nameMeanings.name: Basset
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: from a diminutive of Old French bas(se) ‘short, of low stature’ (see Bas ).
English: variant of   Bassett  , a cognate of 1 above.
In some cases also an altered form of French Besset (see Bessette 2). Compare Bassette 1.

variants.name: Bas
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Mauricio, Abelardo, Florencio, Francisco, Jorge, Luis, Manuel, Pedro, Soledad, Vicente.  Eastern Slavic Dmytro, Liya, Pyotr, Sergey.
Catalan: habitational name from a place so named in the district of La Garrotxa, Catalonia.
Basque: topographic name for someone who lived by a wood, from baso ‘wood, forest’.

nameMeanings.name: Isabella
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabella Basset was born in 1172, in Clapham, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Thomas Basset, was 42 and her mother, Adeliza Dunstanville, was 38. She married Robert Mauduit Lord of Hanslope about 1190, in Hanslope, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 5 January 1224, in Hanslope, Buckinghamshire, England, at the age of 52.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabella Basset est née en 1172, à Clapham, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Basset, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Adeliza Dunstanville, avait 38 ans. Elle a épousé Robert Mauduit Lord of Hanslope environ 1190, à Hanslope, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 5 janvier 1224, à Hanslope, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 52 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabella Basset 1172 in Clapham, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Basset 42 und ihre Mutter Adeliza Dunstanville 38. Sie hat um 1190 in Hanslope, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom Robert Mauduit Lord of Hanslope geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 5. Januar 1224 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Hanslope, Buckinghamshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabella Basset è nata il nel 1172 nel Clapham, Bedfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Thomas Basset, aveva 42 anni e sua madre, Adeliza Dunstanville, aveva 38 anni. Lei sposato Robert Mauduit Lord of Hanslope circa 1190, nel Hanslope, Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 5 gennaio 1224, nel Hanslope, Buckinghamshire, England, all'età di 52 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabella Bassetが1172年にイギリスイギリスベドフォードシュアイアクラファムで生まれた時，父Thomas Bassetは42歳，母Adeliza Dunstanvilleは38歳であった。約1190年にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアハンスロペでRobert Mauduit Lord of Hanslopeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1224年1月5日にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアハンスロペで52歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabella Basset(이)가 1172년 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르 클라프아에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Basset(은)는 42세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Adeliza Dunstanville(은)는 38세였다. 그녀는 대략 1190년 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 핸슬로프에서 Robert Mauduit Lord of Hanslope(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1224년 1월 5일 영국 벅잉함실르 핸슬로프에서 52세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabella Basset nasceu em 1172, em Clapham, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas Basset, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Adeliza Dunstanville, tinha 38 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert Mauduit Lord of Hanslope aproximadamente 1190, em Hanslope, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 5 de janeiro de 1224, em Hanslope, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, com 52 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabella Basset родилась в 1172 г. в местности клафам, бедфордшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Thomas Basset было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Adeliza Dunstanville, 38. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert Mauduit Lord of Hanslope около 1190 г. в местности ханслоп, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 5 января 1224 г. в местности ханслоп, буккингхамшир, Англия в возрасте 52 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isabella Basset nació en 1172, en Clapham, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Thomas Basset, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Adeliza Dunstanville, tenía 38 años. Se casó con Robert Mauduit Lord of Hanslope aproximadamente 1190, en Hanslope, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 5 de enero de 1224, en Hanslope, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 52 años.
